Speed profile: Fastest overall completion; fast-core / longer-tail profile
Predictability: Fast but more variable than predictability-first alternatives
Overhead source & lever: Distributed overhead profile; optimize entry/setup and execution path before residual tail
Verdict & deployment: Generally usable with healthier success profile; mainly push-associated

Speed profile: Mixed-speed case: early entry can be competitive, but completion tail is heavy
Overhead source & lever: Tail-heavy mixed case; reduce bespoke post-execution work and standardize orchestration
Verdict & deployment: Sparse and context-sensitive; low observed success and often pull_request-associated

Overhead source & lever: Execution-centric profile; first optimization target is the main execution path
Verdict & deployment: Most usable and success-oriented outcomes; mainly schedule-associated

Speed profile: Slow sustained-execution profile with heavy entry burden
Overhead source & lever: Heavy entry plus heavy execution; optimize provisioning delay and provider-side execution cost
Verdict & deployment: Usable verdicts common, but success strongly trigger-conditioned; mainly schedule-associated
